chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 1249 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 4909/25 2.For orders on office objections 3.For orders on CMA 4910/25 4.For orders on CMA 4911/25 5.For hearing of main case 30-07-2025 Mr. Manoj Kumar Tejwani, Advocate for petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2to5. The petitioner has already availed the remedy by filing Appeal under Regulation 161 in view of Regulation 161 of the Sindh Public Service Commission (Recruitment Management) Regulations, 2023 (available at page-109 of the petition), and according to learned counsel, same is still pending and during pendeny of that Appeal, the petitioner has approached this Court. Since the petitioner has already availed his alternate remedy by filing Appeal which is pending with the respondents and Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kubar, AAG available in Court in other matters while waiving notice of this petition submits that directions may be issued to Chairman, SPSC (respondents/ competent authority to decide his appeal, which is available at page-109 of the petition within 15 days, as required by law from today after providing proper opportunity to the petiotner. After such, learned counsel for petitioner while expressing his satisfaction does not press instant petition. Order accordingly. Instant petition stands disposed of along with listed applications in the above terms. Let copy of this order be communicated to Chairman, Sindh Public Service Commission, Hyderabad by FAX for information and compliance. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
